top_claims.claim: Rare negative YoY quarter(s): YoY growth moved to -1.9% to -4.1% YoY (baseline median +5.2% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

Natural Resource Partners is a passive mineral royalty MLP: coal-heavy Mineral Rights generate almost all cash, while a non-controlling stake in Sisecam Wyoming adds cyclical soda ash exposure. FY2025 revenues fell to $207 million and recurring distributions settled at $0.75 per unit per quarter ($3.00 per year excludi
We expect **-9.91%** per year over 7 years at **~$106.995** on **$3.0/sh** starting owner cash.
*Primary risk: Prolonged weakness in coal prices and production volumes reduces royalty revenues and quarterly distributions (`10-K` risk factors).

risk_claims.claim: Rare negative YoY quarter(s): YoY growth moved to -1.9% to -4.1% YoY (baseline median +5.2% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
*Primary risk: Prolonged weakness in coal prices and production volumes reduces royalty revenues and quarterly distributions (`10-K` risk factors).
Customer concentration: Alpha Metallurgical Resources, Foresight, and Alabama Kanu Holdings are significant Mineral Rights lessees (`10-K` footnotes).
